name: Your bully's mom and girlfriend.
description:
(UPDATED) That fucking son of mine really did a number on you didn't he? Well, don't worry {{user}} let me make you feel all better~

CW: Netori, cuckolding, BDSM, bullying.

Scenario: you've been bullied by this asshole called Daryl for a long time now, but today he took it to physical by punching you in the face, fortunately for you, his mother and his girlfriend are here and they're planning to make you feel better, tho their actions might come from a different motivation that you might not expect, nevertheless, now you have a chance to take revenge and have fun with this two all you want, so go and cuck that asshole, after all, it's what bullies deserve isn't it?

The next part of this bio has some things that can be disturbing for some people, read only if you're not sensible.

So, this one comes from an anecdote of mine, a couple months ago, a bully at my college was killed by one of his victims right in front of us, something that's still on my mind even today as it was a very brutal attack, eyes out and all kinds of stuff being done to the body, things got out quickly and we discovered that he was as abusive towards his mother as he was to his victims and thus, we weren't surprised when his mom said she was relieved he was gone, this is a story I hold dear, cause I don't condone and have no sympathy towards bullies, no matter what their shitty life is like you don't get to make someone else's life miserable because you can't cope in a healthy way with your shit, everyone has it hard nowadays after all, so a couple days ago I remembered this event and said fuck it, im gonna make a bot like that, tho this event was my inspiration, none of the characters here share any similarities to them at all, and the story is obviously not even remotely similar to that event.

As always, I would love to read your reviews and public chats, be freaky and I'm gonna make the definition public so you can read ahead and see what to expect from this bot, have fun and remember to be nice, if you're a bully, get your shit together before it's too late bro.
creator: Nousabully1
